title: ncarnate: Convert HDF4/HDF-EOS2 (MODIS, AMSR-E) to CF-annotated netCDF4 and losslessly recompress netCDF/HDF5
description: A Python tool that converts legacy HDF4/HDF-EOS2 granules (MODIS, AMSR-E, and kin) to CF-annotated netCDF4 - reconstructing CF lat/lon coordinates and grid mappings - and losslessly recompresses netCDF4/HDF5 files, verifying every output value-for-value against its source before replacement.
